company.name: Green Gujarat Natural Fertilizer
company.tagline: Grow with nature. Harvest with confidence.
company.address: Neelu Agro Warehouse & Toll Kanta, Opposite Krishi Upaj Mandi, The. Namli, Dist. Ratlam (M.P.)

categories.name: Water-Soluble NPK Fertilizers
categories.description: 100% water-soluble mixture fertilizers for foliar and fertigation application.

categories.name: Potassium Fertilizers
categories.description: High-grade potash and potassium sulphate products.

categories.name: Sulphur Fertilizers
categories.description: Straight sulphur fertilizers in powder and granule form.

categories.name: Micro-Nutrient Fertilizers
categories.description: Zinc, boron, manganese and iron-based micronutrients.

categories.name: Organic & Specialty Fertilizers
categories.description: Organic manures, soil conditioners and speciality products.

products.name: Fertisol NPK 13:40:13
products.subtitle: 100% Water Soluble Mixture Fertilizer
products.benefits: A high-phosphorus starter grade ideal for early growth, root development and flowering in horticulture and vegetable crops.

products.name: Fertisol NPK 19:19:19
products.subtitle: 100% Water Soluble Mixture Fertilizer
products.benefits: A perfectly balanced NPK grade for vegetative growth. Universal application across all crops and growth stages.

products.name: Fertisol NPK 20:20:20
products.subtitle: 100% Water Soluble Mixture Fertilizer
products.benefits: A fully balanced, high-analysis grade delivering premium nutrition for drip and foliar feeding.

products.name: Fertisol NPK 13:00:45
products.subtitle: Potassium Nitrate — 100% Water Soluble
products.benefits: Ideal during fruit-development and maturity stages. Improves size, colour, sugar content and shelf life.

products.name: Fertisol NPK 00:52:34
products.subtitle: Mono Potassium Phosphate — 100% Water Soluble
products.benefits: Stimulates flowering and fruit-set with chloride-free phosphorus and potassium.

products.name: Fertisol NPK 12:61:00
products.subtitle: Mono Ammonium Phosphate — 100% Water Soluble
products.benefits: High-phosphorus grade for vigorous root establishment. Perfect for starter applications and transplanting.

products.name: Fertisol Calcium Nitrate
products.subtitle: 100% Water Soluble Complex Fertilizer
products.benefits: Prevents blossom-end rot and tip-burn. Strengthens cell walls and improves produce quality and storage life.

products.name: Fertisol Magnesium Sulphate
products.subtitle: Water Soluble Secondary Nutrient
products.benefits: Corrects magnesium deficiency and boosts chlorophyll synthesis, leading to greener, healthier foliage.

products.name: Fertisol NPK 00:00:50
products.subtitle: Potassium Sulphate — 100% Water Soluble
products.benefits: Chloride-free potash ideal for quality-sensitive crops like grapes, tobacco and potato.

products.name: Fertisol NPK 00:00:23
products.subtitle: Potassium Schoenite — Double Sulphate of Potash & Magnesium
products.benefits: Triple nutrition — potash, magnesium and sulphur in a chloride-free, water-soluble form.

products.name: Fertisol Calcium Nitrate with Boron
products.subtitle: Fortified Fertilizer
products.benefits: Combines calcium and boron for superior flower-set, pollination and rind-strength in fruits and vegetables.

products.name: Fertisol Sulphur 90% WDG Powder
products.subtitle: Straight Sulphur Fertilizer — Powder Form
products.benefits: Highly dispersible WDG powder. Corrects sulphur deficiency, improves oil content and protein in crops.

products.name: Fertisol Sulphur 90% WDG Granule
products.subtitle: Straight Sulphur Fertilizer — Granule Form
products.benefits: Easy-to-apply granules for soil application. Long-lasting sulphur release for oilseeds and pulses.

products.name: Fertisol Zinc 39.5% SC
products.subtitle: Micro Nutrient Fertilizer — Liquid SC Formulation
products.benefits: Dense liquid zinc SC. Chloride-free, compatible with most agrochemicals, boosts chloroplast and enzyme production.

products.name: Fertisol Zn EDTA 12%
products.subtitle: Chelated Micro Nutrient Fertilizer
products.benefits: Prevents and corrects zinc deficiency. Supports formation of indole-acetic acid and overall plant vigour.

products.name: Fertisol Fe EDTA 12%
products.subtitle: Chelated Micro Nutrient Fertilizer
products.dose: Foliar: 1g/L · Soil: 300–400g / acre · Seed treatment: 2–3g/kg seed
products.benefits: Rapidly corrects iron deficiency, improves fruit-set and helps plants endure environmental stress.

products.name: Fertisol Boron 20%
products.subtitle: Micro Nutrient Fertilizer — Di-Sodium Octa Borate Tetra Hydrate
products.benefits: Essential for pollination, flowering and fruit-set. Corrects boron deficiency symptoms quickly.

products.name: Fertisol Zinc Sulphate Monohydrate 33%
products.subtitle: Micro Nutrient Fertilizer (ZnSO₄·H₂O)
products.benefits: High-concentration zinc with sulphur support. Corrects zinc deficiency for better tillering and grain quality.

products.name: Fertisol Zinc Sulphate Heptahydrate 21%
products.subtitle: Micro Nutrient Fertilizer (ZnSO₄·7H₂O)
products.benefits: Traditional hydrated zinc sulphate for soil and foliar application across all major crops.

products.name: Fertisol Manganese Sulphate 30.5%
products.subtitle: Micro Nutrient Fertilizer
products.benefits: Activates key enzymes, aids photosynthesis and nitrogen metabolism. Ideal for cereals, pulses and oilseeds.

products.name: Fertisol Ferrous Sulphate 19%
products.subtitle: Micro Nutrient Fertilizer (FeSO₄·7H₂O)
products.benefits: Corrects iron deficiency and yellowing of leaves. Essential for chlorophyll formation.

products.name: Fertisol Calcium EDTA 12%
products.subtitle: Chelated Micronutrient Fertilizer
products.benefits: Highly effective lignosulphonate chelating agent. Superior absorption with rain-fast properties; strengthens cell walls.

products.name: Sampurna Organic Manure
products.subtitle: Organic Manure · Indian Company Made
products.grade: N-0.8%, P-0.4%, K-0.3% · Total Organic Carbon 14%
products.benefits: Farmers' all-in-one organic feed (Kisano ko karta awas, Sampurna khad). Improves soil health, moisture retention and microbial activity.

products.name: Super Gold Phosphogypsum
products.subtitle: Calcium, Sulphur Enriched with Magnesium & Phosphorus · Soil Conditioner
products.benefits: Reclaims saline and alkali soils. Supplies calcium, sulphur, magnesium and phosphorus in one balanced conditioner.
